description: This professional 28cm Sauteuse from Le Creuset’s 3-ply range is a versatile kitchen essential, featuring a multi-layered construction that ensures rapid, uniform heat distribution from base to rim. This specific 5.7-litre variant is distinguished by its generous capacity and dual stainless-steel side handles, making it ideal for batch cooking and seamless hob-to-table serving. Included in this package is the precision-fit stainless steel lid, which locks in moisture and nutrients during slow braising. Unlike smaller models, this 28cm version comfortably caters to large family meals of 6-8 portions.
features: Tri-ply construction (18/10 interior, aluminium core, 18/0 exterior), 360° pouring rim, capacity markings, helper handle.
uses: Sautéing, reducing sauces, poaching, simmering risottos, searing.

accessories.name: Stainless Steel Lid
accessories.description: Close-fitting 28cm lid to retain heat and moisture.

accessories.name: Helper Handle
accessories.description: Integrated stainless steel handle for stability during lifting.

accessories.name: Splatter Guard
accessories.description: Stainless steel mesh guard to contain oil projection.

name: Le Creuset 3-Ply Stainless Steel Sauteuse
